case_title: CARLOS A JACOBO VS. GARAGE DOOR LAB

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0.0 SERVED AUG-30-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARAGE DOOR LAB

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY JACOBO, CARLOS A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBO, CARLOS A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARAGE DOOR LAB $1,825.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARAGE DOOR LAB
